title: TIEDC Objectives
content: OBJECTIVES To provide an Entrepreneurial eco-system, inducing an Entrepreneurial mindset into youths to contribute towards market expansion and job creation. To Promote linkage between the University, Industries, R&D Institutions and Financial Institutions. To conduct Entrepreneurship Program and Workshops in the University in order to develop Entrepreneurship, Innovation skills among the youths. To help budding Entrepreneurs to acquire necessary managerial skills to run their business venture.
